steps.title: Find what makes the calendars different
steps.content:
The student's goal is to emphasize a DIFFERENCE between the two calendars.

Among the notes, one statement directly identifies a difference: “the timelines for the months don't match”.

This is reinforced by examples such as Ventóse (FR month 6) aligning with February (Gregorian month 2), and Floréal (FR month 8) aligning with April (Gregorian month 4).

steps.title: Pick the choice that highlights that difference
steps.content: C directly identifies and exemplifies the difference in month timelines. The others either describe only one calendar or mention a shared feature rather than a difference. That matches choice C — C is correct.
